results.title: Close
results.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

results.title: Close
results.overview: When 30-somethings Sam and Jamie lock themselves out in the communal stairwell they're forced to consider that maybe they aren't as close as they thought.

results.title: Close To Love
results.original_title: 我们的样子像极了爱情
results.overview: Xu Yi and Gao Xiaonan unexpectedly reunite during their college years, resulting in a bond that spans multiple years as they accompany each other and grow together. Will the friendship between Xu Yi and Gao Xiaonan change? Will they part away or stay together?

results.title: Close
results.overview: A glimpse into the day of a son visiting his sick father. The film follows the son as he helps his father with his daily routines, while trying to create a connection with the distant figure.

results.title: Hotter Up Close
results.overview: On the eve of his 30th birthday, a gay slacker must overcome his crippling insecurities in order to find love.

results.title: Too Close
results.overview: Andrea is single-handedly building a safer life for her two children, after having put her abusive ex-partner in prison. However, her efforts are constantly challenged by the small Transylvanian community she lives in. Most villagers openly support her ex-partner, blaming Andrea for fabricating false accusations against him.

results.title: Gorillas Close Up
results.overview: Gabon's Loango National Park is home to a group of western lowland gorillas who have become accustomed to biologists who have studied them for almost twenty years. This documentary presents an intimate look at the silverback Kamaya and his family and features a newborn baby gorilla, brave researchers, forest elephants, buffalos and the last remaining wild coastline in the African tropics.

results.title: Close
results.overview: When two people meet on the subway, their lives take a turn and they end up on a rollercoaster of emotions, touches, words and love.

results.title: Close-Up
results.overview: Tasked to produce a short intro to my feature-length essay Cut, I turned to the origins of the close-up, in a scene featuring camera person Billy Bitzer and director D.W. Griffiths. How to live in this new body, with its cuts, its fissures and fractures?

results.title: Close Dance
results.overview: Winter. Cold that penetrates and restricts the blood from warming you. You dance alone, somehow trying to spread some heat within you, around you. Far away a person is standing, trying to dance the pain away. Just like you.  You see each other, dance towards each other. Are you getting warmer? Closer. Are we getting warmer?

results.title: English
results.overview: Coker Close is a 2022 yoruba language comedy drama series directed by Joe Adetona airing via Osumare TV on Youtube. It is produced by Martini Animashaun.

results.title: Listen Close
results.overview: Hoping to find some measure of acceptance, Howard, a farm boy who feels misunderstood by his rural family, resorts to stealing a cursed old man's wish-granting box. Despite many warnings, he remains blind to his blessings.

results.title: Close Quarters
results.overview: A tiny bathroom inducts signals of togetherness between the plexus of chosen Filipinx family.

results.title: Up Close
results.overview: Hold me like an amphitheater, I need space to stretch my longing. Touch starved and hell bent, an exhale of earthly hungers.

results.title: Close Your Eyes
results.overview: A musician's quiet evening turns into a night of terror when he sees his roommate sleepwalking.

results.title: Close to You
results.overview: Two queer best friends face their true feelings for each other at the end of a lengthy and chaotic birthday celebration.

results.title: Close Your Eyes
results.overview: A heavy secret and oblivious parents.

results.title: Alien Contactees: Close Encounters
results.overview: Two users of the CE5 contact protocol share their experiences and views on channeling extraterrestrials, angels and visiting alien worlds.

results.title: If Close Eyes Tightly
results.overview: What will a little boy wonder when blowing out the candles on a birthday cake with his eyes closed tightly?

results.title: Air Force The Movie: Danger Close
results.original_title: Air Force The Movie: Selagi Bernyawa
results.overview: The movie follows the story of a PASKAU team led by Captain Adib and his mentor, Major Adnan, tasked with protecting humanitarians serving in war torn country, Namburi. On their return home, their plane gets unexpectedly shot down by local militants. Nine of the passengers managed to make their jump before the plane crashes. Back in Malaysia, upon discovery of the news, the air force makes preparation for rescue. Adib`s brother in-law, Zafran, a grounded SUKHOI pilot, fights for the opportunity to save them. The air force deploys help and the survivors make their final run to salvation.
